repair_summary: Fixed key casing logic to capitalize the last character of the key only if the entire value ends with the uppercase version of that character. Previously, the code incorrectly modified keys based on the first uppercase letter in the value.
covered_requirements: The serialized file must preserve multiline values with continuation lines.
The serialize function must handle any number of sections and options without failure.
The serialized INI file must be valid and parseable by configparser.
